params.name: Blood of Dracula
params.source: Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.8%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Soul Chest (1.5%), Wishing (0.35%)
params.description:
On Apr 5, AD 651, one of Dracula's teeth was pulled out. It affected future generations for hundreds of years.

On this day, Dracula had a toothache and a quack removed two of his canine teeth. He took a closer look and removed teeth and felt creeped out. Dracula went pale on this full moon night. He looked at the doctor arrogantly, holding a crimson goblet in his hand and said, "I'm actually a vegetarian! I usually drink tomato juice. A very healthy drink.
